## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated when behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run test:frontend` / `cargo test` pass locally (or CI green)
- [ ] No secrets, binaries, or generated archives committed
- [ ] Security rules in `docs/DEVELOPMENT.md` still hold (paths, symlinks, no auto-exec)
- [ ] Conventional commit subject style
